title: FUNNY 2 — Joe disappears into a room
prompt: Wide shot in @dream-house. @Joe trots into a tiny open-front room of the Dream House — the doorway is just big enough for the small fluffy white-tan Pomeranian to disappear inside. Only his fluffy tail sticks out, wagging happily. Joe (muffled, from inside): "Yip yip!" Bright living-room light, comedic music.
